name: dawno
description: SA-MP PAWN Editor - A modern Pawno alternative

scripts.package: npm run build --prefix renderer && electron-packager . DAWNO --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --icon=assets/icon.ico --overwrite --ignore="(^/dist|^/renderer/node_modules|^/renderer/src|^/renderer/app|^/renderer/components|^/renderer/context|^/renderer/hooks|^/renderer/lib|^/renderer/styles|^/renderer/pawn-lib|^/renderer/public|^/renderer/.next|^/renderer/tsconfig.json|^/renderer/next.config.ts|^/renderer/package-lock.json|^\.git)" && node scripts/build-installer.js

author: Deks
